title: paesia elmeri
intro: Paesia elmeri, also known as the Elmer's Maidenhair Fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a vascular plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Paesia elmeri are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve circulation, which in turn provides health benefits such as relieving fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in the management of respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Paesia elmeri is often used in the form of infusions or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make poultices and salves.
